testcase.name: test_get_user_data[tourist-True]
testcase.failure:
username = 'tourist', is_valid = True
@pytest.mark.parametrize( "username, is_valid", [ ( "tourist", True ), ( "junah", True ), ( "invalid_username_20240701", False ) ] ) def test_get_user_data(username, is_valid): > user_data = get_user_data(username) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
tests/test_utils.py:24: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
username = 'tourist'
def get_user_data(username: str) -> Optional[UserData]: """Get user data from atcoder""" url = f"https://atcoder.jp/users/{username}" response = treq.get(url)
> soup = BeautifulSoup(response.text, "html.parser") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'Deferred' object has no attribute 'text'
layers/util_layer/python/utils.py:67: AttributeError

testcase.name: test_get_user_data[junah-True]
testcase.failure:
username = 'junah', is_valid = True
@pytest.mark.parametrize( "username, is_valid", [ ( "tourist", True ), ( "junah", True ), ( "invalid_username_20240701", False ) ] ) def test_get_user_data(username, is_valid): > user_data = get_user_data(username) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
tests/test_utils.py:24: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
username = 'junah'
def get_user_data(username: str) -> Optional[UserData]: """Get user data from atcoder""" url = f"https://atcoder.jp/users/{username}" response = treq.get(url)
> soup = BeautifulSoup(response.text, "html.parser") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'Deferred' object has no attribute 'text'
layers/util_layer/python/utils.py:67: AttributeError

testcase.name: test_get_user_data[invalid_username_20240701-False]
testcase.failure:
username = 'invalid_username_20240701', is_valid = False
@pytest.mark.parametrize( "username, is_valid", [ ( "tourist", True ), ( "junah", True ), ( "invalid_username_20240701", False ) ] ) def test_get_user_data(username, is_valid): > user_data = get_user_data(username) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
tests/test_utils.py:24: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
username = 'invalid_username_20240701'
def get_user_data(username: str) -> Optional[UserData]: """Get user data from atcoder""" url = f"https://atcoder.jp/users/{username}" response = treq.get(url)
> soup = BeautifulSoup(response.text, "html.parser") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'Deferred' object has no attribute 'text'
layers/util_layer/python/utils.py:67: AttributeError

testcase.name: test_v1_generate_badge[tourist]
test_v1_generate_badge[junah]
test_v2_generate_badge[tourist]
test_v2_generate_badge[junah]
